openingPrayer: Lord, as the light fades, draw me into your presence.

stations.title: Gratitude
stations.prompt: Today's gospel placed Christ at the threshold of his hour. Name three faces or graces the Father set in your path today.

stations.title: Petition
stations.prompt: Ask the Spirit for light to see the day as Christ saw it.

stations.title: Review the Day
stations.prompt: Walk the hours of today with Jesus beside you. Where did you sense his peace? Where did you feel resistance?

stations.title: Sorrow
stations.prompt: Where did you resist grace today? Speak gently. The Lord is gentle with returning souls.

stations.title: Renewal
stations.prompt: Speak aloud one truth to carry into sleep. Tomorrow begins now.

closing: Carry this into sleep. The Lord keeps watch.
